artifacts.summary: Updated reflexive semantics decision and dead end sections
Changed temporal operator semantics from < to <= (reflexive)
Added T-axiom soundness proofs and fixed temporal proofs for reflexive semantics
Fixed swap soundness proofs for reflexive semantics

partial_progress.details: Phases 0-6 completed. Main build passes (743 jobs). Phases 7-11 remain but are out of main build scope (CanonicalIrreflexivity.lean proof completion to eliminate axiom).

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented reflexive temporal semantics with T-axioms. Main build (743 jobs) passes. Phases 0-6 complete. Remaining phases 7-11 involve completing CanonicalIrreflexivity.lean proof to eliminate the canonicalR_irreflexive axiom - these are out of main build scope.
completion_data.axiom_status: canonicalR_irreflexive remains an axiom; elimination requires phases 7-10
